authority: repository source/config/documentation/test writes, public upstream Git-ref reads, and read-only source audits only; no authenticated GitHub setting, workflow-run, provider, environment-value, secret, deployment, message, release, approval-resume, or production access

workflows.staticAuthority: contents read only; no OIDC, secret, or external mutation
workflows.convergence: one 30-minute run per pull request or ref; newer candidate cancels stale run

workflows.staticAuthority: contents/issues/pull-requests read plus Anthropic OIDC exchange; built-in Read/Glob/Grep tools only
workflows.convergence: one owner-authored issue-comment invocation, 15-minute timeout, stale run cancelled

workflows.staticAuthority: contents and pull-request write only for one Changesets version pull request; no publish, merge, approve, tag, deploy, or release
workflows.convergence: exact repository/main/authority-epoch gate, 20-minute timeout, serialized non-cancelling writer
restoration requires a new accepted SPEC and HGI-306 automation evidence

authorityRegister.emergencyContainment: one-shot exact-target deny/disable/isolate/revoke only; maximum 30 minutes; separate approver; before/after receipt; reconciliation within 24 hours; normal operations forbidden

actionLock.limitation: Public Git refs establish only upstream ref-to-commit identity at observation time, not source safety, OIDC behavior, credential scope, hosted execution, or current GitHub settings.

externalReadbacks.target: GitHub authenticated settings, workflow runs, tokens, OIDC, variables, secrets, comments, and pull requests
Vercel, Executor, Sendblue, Upstash, secret store, AI Gateway, Codex account, deployed Eve, messaging, and delivery

nonClaims: No workflow is claimed to have run, skipped, issued a token, obtained a secret, created a comment or pull request, changed a setting, deployed, released, called a provider, sent a message, or affected Production.
Static authority records, workflow source, action pins, local checks, public Git refs, and old receipts grant no one-run external-operation authority.
